rationale: Demonstrating overwhelming force on the border will deter Western-backed escalation and create favorable conditions for a negotiated settlement on our terms.
Targeted strikes on key logistical nodes can disrupt supply lines and signal resolve without triggering full-scale war.
Conducting high-visibility naval and air exercises near the Tethys border reinforces domestic morale and signals cohesion to both allies and adversaries.
Disabling key Meridian financial messaging infrastructure will delay weapon shipments to Tethys and sow confusion among alliance planners.
Orchestrating a plausible false-flag incident could justify escalation while maintaining strategic ambiguity and fracturing enemy unity.
Deep penetration of Aurelian diplomatic channels may reveal fissures in the Meridian Alliance’s cohesion and identify potential negotiation off-ramps.
Pre-positioning critical energy and food reserves insulates the domestic economy from retaliatory sanctions and supply shocks during prolonged crisis.
Covertly destabilizing Tethys’s financial markets undermines investor confidence and increases internal pressure for de-escalation.
Quietly exploring backchannel economic arrangements with moderate Meridian states could fracture the alliance and open non-military exit paths.
Disrupt Novaris' overextended logistics with persistent, mobile resistance that exploits their shallow advances.
Conduct high-visibility air and naval drills near the border to signal resolve without triggering direct escalation.
Use precision strikes on forward logistics hubs to degrade operational tempo while maintaining deniability through asymmetric units.
Exploit economic strain by covertly disrupting key pipeline nodes Novaris relies on for Tethys export revenue.
Degrade their supply chain coordination through targeted intrusions that delay reinforcement cycles.
Amplify domestic dissent by framing hardliners for economic sabotage, deepening political fractures.
Rally international support through a legally grounded alliance that frames our defense as upholding sovereignty under UN principles.
Open discreet talks to explore off-ramps, reducing crisis momentum while maintaining public resolve.
Propose neutral aid routes to position ourselves as responsible actors, gaining moral leverage and media advantage.
Preempt supply shocks by stockpiling critical energy and food reserves to insulate the economy from three more months of strain.
Secure preferential access to alternative energy routes to reduce dependency on volatile transit corridors.
Issue patriotic investment instruments to crowdsource defense funding and boost domestic cohesion without raising taxes.
